questions.question: Statement: 'Buy one get one free' — Assumption I: Customers prefer free items. Assumption II: Stock is unlimited. Which is implicit?
questions.solution: Step 1: Offers assume customer appeal (I). Step 2: Unlimited stock (II) is not necessarily assumed. Answer: Both I and II.

questions.question: Statement: 'Buy one get one free' — Assumption I: Customers prefer free items. Assumption II: Stock is unlimited. Which is implicit?
questions.solution: Step 1: Offers assume customer appeal (I). Step 2: Unlimited stock (II) is not necessarily assumed. Answer: Only I.
